rationale: The two papers have unusually close scope and method based on the notes: both build structural location-pricing models with Bertrand competition, infer unobserved demand/cost primitives, and use policy simulations (entry/merger or profitability). Given this strong methodological and conceptual overlap (plus a direct DOI match), the citation is plausibly substantive rather than an incidental background mention, so it should be reviewed in second-stage judgment.
